{{Quote|This is Lieutenant Bella of the battleship ''Reaver''. Power down your engines or be exterminated!|[[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] to [[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Reaver''''' was a [[Sabaoth destroyer]] under the command of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]], ensign to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]]. The ''Reaver'' saw combat just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
The ''Reaver'' was dispatched to [[Nod Kartha]] during a raid by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and his allies in the [[Mere Resistance]]. Lieutenant Bella directed her forces in the recovery of a damaged [[Orbital Defense Cannon]] above the planet, but ordered her [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] to engage the pirates upon sighting.

Despite Bella's efforts, Nym and his companions were able to flee with the parts to the cannon, which was later used in the fight to reclaim the pirate base on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Reaver'' is named in the 'Tug of War' mission. It is possible to destroy the ''Reaver'' during this mission, though a second flagship soon takes its place, with Lieutenant Bella onboard and apparently unharmed. It is assumed this is not part of the game's [[canon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
